# CSStats+

<p>
	<a href="https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/csstats-plus/koackgklhpaahkbncajeieppmfnelkeh" target="_blank"><img alt="Chrome"  src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Chrome-333?style=for-the-badge&logo=googlechrome&labelColor=4285F4&logoColor=FFF" /></a>
	<a href="https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/csstats/monioladkfnjcebknlbkkoapkijiopag" target="_blank"><img alt="Edge"    src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Edge-333?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&labelColor=0078D7" /></a>

	<!--<a href="" target="_blank"><img alt="Opera" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Opera-333?style=for-the-badge&logo=opera&labelColor=FF1B2D" /></a>-->
	<!--<a href="" target="_blank"><img alt="Safari" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Safari-333?style=for-the-badge&logo=safari&labelColor=006CFF" /></a>-->
</p>

## Before vs After

CSStats+ improves readability, navigation, and visual consistency across CSStats pages.

### Quick highlights

- **Navigation:** click a match from history to open its CSStats match page directly.
- **Maps data:** full map names, proper sorting, and SVG icons when available.
- **Ranks UI:** clearer rank progression (up/down), better empty states, and separated rank contexts.
- **Visual quality:** sharper SVG assets and cleaner layout alignment.
- **Data clarity:** more complete stats presentation with less clutter.

---

### Player Profile

<details><summary><strong>Main tab</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Match history entries are now clickable.
- Most-played / success maps now show complete data (not only top 5).
- Full map names replace technical filenames.
- Map rows are properly sorted and include map icons.
- Match count + win rate are both displayed.
- Rank area is less cluttered and easier to browse.
- Premier rank history can be navigated with arrows.
- Community Maps ranks are shown separately.
- Rank elements can be clicked to filter related data.
- Stats charts are visually improved and flag unusually high values in orange.

</details>

<details><summary><strong>Maps tab</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-maps-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-maps-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Larger map icons.
- SVG map icons used when available.
- Full map names for better readability.

</details>

<details><summary><strong>Matches tab</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-matches-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/player-matches-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Competitive, Wingman, and FACEIT ranks rendered in SVG.
- Competitive/Wingman now show rank change target (up/down) instead of only final rank.
- Full map names and improved icon quality.

</details>

---

### Matches

<details><summary><strong>Overview</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Wingman average rank is fetched and displayed.
- FACEIT / Competitive / Wingman average-rank icons use SVG.
- Map icons use SVG when available.

</details>

---

### Match page

**Header improvements**
- Map icon centered in the match details header.
- Full map name displayed below the icon.
- Average rank icon shown under the map name.
- Tie score blue uses a color closer to the CSStats theme.

<ul>
<li><details><summary><strong>Competitive</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-competitive-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-competitive-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Rank up/down is clearer with directional arrows.
- Previous and new rank icons are shown together.
- Missing rank now shows an explicit “unknown rank” icon.

</details></li>

<li><details><summary><strong>Wingman</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-wingman-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-wingman-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Rank up/down is clearer with arrows + icon transition.
- Wingman-specific rank icons are used.
- Missing rank now shows the “unknown rank” icon.

</details></li>

<li><details><summary><strong>FACEIT</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-faceit-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-faceit-after.png) |

**Changes**
- FACEIT level icons are larger and rendered in SVG.

</details></li>

<li><details><summary><strong>Premier</strong></summary>

| Before | After |
|:--:|:--:|
| ![Before](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-premier-before.png) | ![After](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Juknum/csstats-plus/refs/heads/main/media/screenshots/match-premier-after.png) |

**Changes**
- Missing rank now shows a clear `---` placeholder.

</details></li>
</ul>
